scripts.prebuild: node scripts/export-public-data.mjs && node scripts/build-entity-history.mjs && node scripts/build-updates-manifest.mjs && node scripts/build-feeds.mjs && node scripts/build-special-briefings.mjs && node scripts/build-og-images.mjs && node scripts/build-llms.mjs
scripts.build: node scripts/validate-indexes.mjs && node scripts/lint-daily-briefings.mjs && node scripts/validate-daily-briefings.mjs && node scripts/build-manifest.mjs && next build && node scripts/build-search-index.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:scoring && npm run test:lint && npm run test:history && npm run test:entity-href
